name: OceanaGold Corporation
description: OceanaGold Corporation is a multinational gold producer with a portfolio of established operating assets including the Didipio Mine in the Philippines, the Macraes and Waihi operations in New Zealand, and the Haile Gold Mine in the United States. The company is committed to responsible mining and leverages its technical expertise to optimize production and extend the life of its assets. OceanaGold focuses on delivering sustainable value for its shareholders while maintaining high standards of environmental and social performance across its global operations.
